For mainnet scale, replace selection sort with an incremental sorted list."},"recordActivity(address,string,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Record trading activity for an agent (called by protocol contracts)"},"recordPnL(address,uint256,bool)":{"notice":"Record P&L update for an agent"},"registerAgent(address,string,string,string)":{"notice":"Register a new AI agent wallet"},"removeReporter(address)":{"notice":"Revoke a previously authorized reporter."},"setUBIBPS(uint256)":{"notice":"Update the UBI contribution percentage (in basis points)."},"transferAdmin(address)":{"notice":"Initiate two-step admin transfer. New admin must call acceptAdmin() to confirm."},"updateProfile(address,string,string,string)":{"notice":"Update agent profile (only owner)"}},"notice":"Tracks AI agent wallets, their trading activity across all         GoodDollar L2 protocols, and ranks them by UBI generated.         Every protocol (swaps, perps, predict, lend, stable, stocks, yield)         calls `recordActivity()` when an agent executes a trade. The registry         maintains cumulative stats and a leaderboard.         Supports agent profiles (name, avatar URI, strategy description) so         the frontend can render a rich leaderboard.         20% of every fee on GoodDollar L2 funds UBI. This contract tracks         how much each agent has *indirectly* contributed to UBI through fees.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/AgentRegistry.sol":"AgentRegistry"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":ds-test/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/forge-std/lib/ds-test/src/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":openzeppelin/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/AgentRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0xf41cc6f53a51404710730552497a63935821a07ed65d37be3623ef191ce082be","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://8d3ab5fe4e935d59c09b8586ffa0e151846b74ca19334990bd4cd9bc5af29104","dweb:/ipfs/QmPVmUmySHU5pWjpLf1MMGdbAupWedwDMbhQYVeWtNxyN8"]}},"version":1}

params.reporter: Address of the protocol contract to authorize.
Address of the reporter to deauthorize.

params._bps: New basis points value. Must be ≤ 10 000 (100%).

params.newAdmin: New admin address. Must not be address(0).

MAX_LEADERBOARD_COUNT().notice: Hard cap on leaderboard query size (outer × inner = count × n)

acceptAdmin().notice: Accept the pending admin transfer (must be called by pendingAdmin).

addReporter(address).notice: Authorize a protocol contract to call `recordActivity()`.

getAgentInfo(address).notice: Get full profile + stats for an agent

getTopAgents(uint256).notice: Get top N agents by UBI contribution (capped at MAX_LEADERBOARD_COUNT)

maxAgents().notice: Hard cap on registered agents to bound getTopAgents gas usage.         Keep low: getTopAgents is O(count × maxAgents) with cold SLOADs.         At 30M block gas, safe bound is ~1000 agents × 50 leaderboard slots.         For mainnet scale, replace selection sort with an incremental sorted list.

recordActivity(address,string,uint256,ui.notice: Record trading activity for an agent (called by protocol contracts)

recordPnL(address,uint256,bool).notice: Record P&L update for an agent

registerAgent(address,string,string,stri.notice: Register a new AI agent wallet

setUBIBPS(uint256).notice: Update the UBI contribution percentage (in basis points).

transferAdmin(address).notice: Initiate two-step admin transfer. New admin must call acceptAdmin() to confirm.
